amendment.description: To transfer amounts for youth mentoring programs of the Department of Justice.

vote.text: Amendment SA 5506 not agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 46 - 53. Record Vote Number: 154.

action.text: Amendment SA 5506 proposed by Senator Hirono to Amendment SA 5453.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5506 proposed by Senator Hirono to Amendment SA 5453.
Senate amendment not agreed to: Amendment SA 5506 not agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 46 - 53. Record Vote Number: 154.
Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Amendment SA 5506 not agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 46 - 53. Record Vote Number: 154.
